title: Ben's Electric Solutions - Onboarding Data Gathering

sentences.text: Let's nail down your configurations for the agent. What are your hours and address?
We are Monday - Friday, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM EST. The office is 123 Main St, Springfield, IL.
Fires, complete power outages, and sparking electrical panels. For emergencies, try my direct line: 555-0101 first. If no answer, call Dispatcher Sarah: 555-0102. Timeout after 60 seconds.
